---
title: "m2b3 Output"
description: |

output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

### Preprints

* Information integration across saccades plays a prominent role during goal-directed viewing of everyday scenes. [PsyArxiv](https://psyarxiv.com/8yta9). Jurewicz K, Liao B, Krishna BS. August 21, 2023.

* Correction of saccadic decisions during free-viewing visual search in the monkey. [OSF Preprints](https://osf.io/vt423). Ipata AE, Bisley JW, Krishna BS. August 21, 2023.
